title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IndiaMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
